name: Swiss Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a shallow casserole dish.
2. Arrange the sliced Gruyere cheese on top of the melted butter.
3. Break the eggs into the casserole dish, keeping them whole.
4. Add salt and pepper to the heavy cream.
5. Carefully pour the cream over the eggs.
6. Sprinkle the Parmesan cheese evenly over the mixture.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 minutes.
8. If desired, broil the dish for a few minutes to brown the cheese topping.
